payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and visible vertical wood grain; finish appears matte and slightly worn at the edges, crop is edge-cut/partial and shows no hardware; estimated distance ~0.6 m from camera.
